Class MatchingApplicationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.application.impl.MatchingApplicationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
MatchingApplicationService
public class MatchingApplicationServiceImpl extends Object implements MatchingApplicationService
Default implementation of MatchingApplicationService that orchestrates animal-adopter matching in both directions. Filters available animals by shelter, delegates scoring to the matching services, and optionally generates natural-language explanations via ExplanationService.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructs a MatchingApplicationServiceImpl with all required service dependencies.

  • Constructor Details

    • MatchingApplicationServiceImpl

      public MatchingApplicationServiceImpl(AdopterBasedMatchingService adopterBasedMatchingService, AnimalBasedMatchingService animalBasedMatchingService, AnimalService animalService, AdopterService adopterService, ShelterService shelterService, ExplanationService explanationService)
      Constructs a MatchingApplicationServiceImpl with all required service dependencies. All six services are mandatory; none may be null.
      Parameters:
      adopterBasedMatchingService - the service that ranks animals for an adopter; must not be null
      animalBasedMatchingService - the service that ranks adopters for an animal; must not be null
      animalService - the service for animal lookups; must not be null
      adopterService - the service for adopter lookups; must not be null
      shelterService - the service for shelter lookups; must not be null
      explanationService - the service for generating match explanations; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • matchAnimalsForAdopter

      public List<MatchResult> matchAnimalsForAdopter(String adopterId, String shelterId, boolean withExplanation)
      Finds and ranks available animals in the given shelter for the specified adopter. Only animals whose adopterId is null are considered. If withExplanation is true, each result is supplemented with a natural-language explanation. Returns an empty list if no available animals are found. Filters animals in the shelter to only those available (adopterId == null), then delegates scoring to the adopter-based matching service.
      Specified by:
      matchAnimalsForAdopter in interface MatchingApplicationService
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter to match for; must not be null or blank
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to search in; must not be null or blank
      withExplanation - if true, explanation text is generated for each result
      Returns:
      a ranked list of MatchResult instances, best match first

    • matchAdoptersForAnimal

      public List<MatchResult> matchAdoptersForAnimal(String animalId, boolean withExplanation)
      Finds and ranks all registered adopters by compatibility with the given available animal. Throws an exception if the animal is not found or has already been adopted. If withExplanation is true, each result is supplemented with a natural-language explanation. Returns an empty list if no adopters are registered. Throws if the animal is already adopted. Scores all registered adopters.
      Specified by:
      matchAdoptersForAnimal in interface MatchingApplicationService
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to match for; must not be null or blank
      withExplanation - if true, explanation text is generated for each result
      Returns:
      a ranked list of MatchResult instances, best match first
